title: Battleworn Dummy
description:
As you approach, it begins to rumble and fizzle and lights up brilliantly!

"[jitter]BZZZT![/jitter] TIME TO TRAIN!!! YOU HAVE [blue]3 TURNS[/blue] TO DEFEAT ME!
CHOOSE A SETTING OR FACE [red]LETHAL HUMILIATION[/red].
Here are the options:"

After the terrifying message, the dummy carefully reads out detailed instructions.

What do you choose?

options.title: Setting 1
options.description: Fight a [blue]75[/blue] HP dummy. Procure [blue]1[/blue] random [gold]Potion[/gold].

options.title: Setting 2
options.description: Fight a [blue]150[/blue] HP dummy. [gold]Upgrade[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random cards.

options.title: Setting 3
options.description: Fight a [blue]300[/blue] HP dummy. Obtain a random [gold]Relic[/gold].

notes:
A training encounter where you must defeat the selected dummy within a [blue]3-turn[/blue] time limit. The dummy does not attack (passive encounter), so you only need to deal damage to win.

[gold]Core Mechanics:[/gold]
• Each setting represents a training difficulty level with increasing HP: 75 → 150 → 300
• You have exactly [blue]3 turns[/blue] to deal enough damage to defeat the chosen dummy
• If you defeat the dummy within [blue]3 turns[/blue]: victory, receive setting-specific reward
• If time expires: defeat message, run continues but no reward
• HP values scale with player count in multiplayer runs

[gold]Rewards by Setting:[/gold]
• [gold]Setting 1:[/gold] 1 random [gold]Potion[/gold] (from character's potion pool, or shared pool if character pool is empty)
• [gold]Setting 2:[/gold] [blue]2[/blue] random upgradeable cards from your deck are upgraded
• [gold]Setting 3:[/gold] 1 random [gold]Relic[/gold] (pulled from standard relic pool)

[gold]Run Continuation:[/gold] This event does not end your run — you continue normally regardless of victory or defeat.
